request_summary: Create a dashboard workflow with backend APIs and an Agentic System observability section.

business: Provide a usable dashboard for enterprise workflow visibility.
functional: Generate frontend, backend, API docs, and agent observability.
assumptions: Next.js and Node.js are acceptable defaults

complexity.reasoning_summary: Multiple domains and persistent observability justify specialist agents.

agent_decision.reasoning_summary: Frontend, backend, database, and observability have independent ownership boundaries.

risks: Over-generation of agents if cost function is ignored
